target.title: feat: add tool search directory mode
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` so large catalogs can expose a compact prompt directory plus `tool_describe`/`tool_call` controls while deferring most schemas.
- Hydrate likely or requested directory tools from the catalog, including missing tool calls, while preserving sequential execution contracts.
- Keep client tools directly visible in directory mode and document the new mode.

Fork attribution: based on JuanHuaXu/openclaw `codex/tool-search-directory-mode`, compared from `codex/fix-post-tool-continuation-guard`.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.
- Hosted Crabbox/Testbox live E2E: `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791

- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.



## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` keeps authorized catalog schemas deferred while preserving normal validation, hooks, execution, result normalization, replay, and provider continuation. Final head `b127cef60a2c013915342338d42a593fabe78502` also fail-closes ambiguous bare tool names, excludes MCP tools from native capability guidance and the high-trust directory prompt, and preserves single-owner hook execution for deferred hydration.
- Real environment tested: Final head `b127cef60a2c013915342338d42a593fabe78502` was tested from the isolated PR worktree against current `upstream/main` `80473504454cbfc49dc18a25a2fc92065e662912`. The earlier hosted live Testbox proof remains feature-head-only: `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: repository project-aware Vitest runner across 12 focused files; `pnpm tsgo:core`; `pnpm tsgo:test:src`; scoped oxlint and oxfmt; `node scripts/build-all.mjs`; Plugin SDK API and config-doc baseline checks; `git diff --check`; `git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD`; exact trusted brokered Kepler autoreview request.
- Evidence after fix:

Current head: `b127cef60a2c013915342338d42a593fabe78502`  
Current upstream/main: `80473504454cbfc49dc18a25a2fc92065e662912`  
Focused Vitest: 4 shards, 12 files, 455 tests passed  
Core and source-test type checks: passed  
Scoped oxlint and oxfmt: passed  
Production build: passed  
Plugin SDK API and config-doc baselines: passed  
`git diff --check`: passed  
`git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD`: passed  
Trusted brokered Kepler autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings; overall patch is correct (0.86)

- Observed result after fix: Deterministic proof covers directory catalog construction, authorized deferred hydration through the normal agent loop, replay and provider-continuation contracts, ambiguous-name rejection with exact-ID dispatch, MCP capability filtering, MCP name/description isolation from the system prompt, single-owner hook execution, generated contract baselines, and current-main integration. Final-head GitHub checks inspected during closeout had no failures; routine CI was still completing.
- What was not tested: Exact-head hosted live directory lookup, deferred execution, and provider continuation were not completed. Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kv1a25p6dw9p53rks72s508b` / https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27477912154 hydrated but its SSH hostname never resolved. Owned AWS lease `cbx_e0c4e1022f8e` became ready, but GitHub-runner hydration was blocked because the available token lacked repository/self-hosted-runner write permission. The local hosted-live profile was unavailable. Both remote resources were stopped/released. Maintainers still need to decide whether the third persisted mode and generic `resolveDeferredTool` agent-core/session callback are the intended permanent compatibility boundary.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
